title: PipeShare polished site menu (dbg128)
description:
PipeShare header is now minimal like PipeSync: fixed PIPESHARE wordmark top-left, Menu button top-right only. Identity (name + role pill), theme picker, Folder view, Share access, and Admin Panel all live inside the cp-menu panel with grouped sections.

All user types (Horizon admin, employee, client) get the same menu structure; admin-only rows are permission-gated. Menu borders, role pills, and selects follow active theme and SaaS tenant brand colors via --hp-btn-accent.

Includes the site-wide SaaS client Forbidden fix: portal-scoped users can load PipeShare with an empty tree when folder ACL is not assigned yet.

Who is affected: OVH private server on deploy. SaaS when Mike applies the platform version in releases.html.
changeLog: PipeShare header stripped to Menu only; logo stays in corner bar.
Site menu module: identity, theme, Admin tools inside cp-menu panel.
Share access and Folder view moved from header into Admin menu group.
Menu CSS uses tenant brand accent (--hp-btn-accent) for pills and selects.
SaaS client Forbidden fix: job access without folder grants when scope assigned.
